changes: fix(cli): handle EOF and Ctrl-C gracefully in setup wizard - prints 'Setup cancelled.' instead of raw traceback
Affects both 'pinetunnel setup' and 'pinetunnel start' wizard paths
notes: Bugfix release. Previously, pressing Ctrl-D or piping empty input to any wizard prompt threw an unhandled EOFError traceback. Now both cmd_setup and cmd_start wrap _run_setup_wizard() in try/except (EOFError, KeyboardInterrupt).
